creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 174427
Proposed patch (since 421387 revision)

Hello Dmitry Marakasov and Antoine Brodin.

I reviewed the proposed patch (attachment #173968) and wanted to suggest different approach:
- Intoruduce CONFIGURE_VERBOSE variable
- Add the same BATCH and PACKAGE_BUILDING checks for NINJA_VERBOSE and CONFIGURE_VERBOSE, as for CMAKE_VERBOSE

This way, the possibility to enable/disable verbose builds will remain.
The compact build output also useful, e.g. for rebuilds of the same port, in my opinion. While verbose build output is useful for fixing issue(s).
